about.heading: ABOUT
about.description:
I am a Full-Stack Developer and Software Automation Engineer dedicated to building high-performance, scalable solutions that solve real-world problems. My journey is unique: I began in Marine Navigation and Logistics, where I learned the value of precision and operational reliability in high-stakes environments. Today, I apply that same 'mission-critical' mindset to software engineering and DevOps best practices.

I specialize in the Go, Python, and Node.js ecosystems, with a deep focus on cloud-native architectures (AWS/Azure) and CI/CD orchestration. My work isn't just about writing code, it's about driving efficiency. I have a proven track record of reducing manual processing times by 60% and increasing deployment efficiency by 30% through strategic automation.

When I'm not optimizing pipelines or resolving the occasional 150+ bugs before production, you'll find me exploring the Rust ecosystem or contributing to open-source projects. I thrive on curiosity and I'm always ready to push the boundaries of what's possible in modern tech.
about.buttonText: Let's connect and build something amazing together!

career.heading: Career
career.SAGE.title: Software Automation Engineer
career.SAGE.description: Automated CI/CD pipelines, scripting with Python, Powershell, Groovy, Go, streamline releases and deployments to AWS, containerized services with Docker and Kubernetes, managed infrastructure as code with Terraform, maintained MySQL databases, delivered Power BI reports
career.ACC.title: Full Stack Developer
career.ACC.description: Developed front/back with React, Next.js, Node.js, FastAPI; managed GraphQL microservices; optimized CI/CD on Azure DevOps; delivered quality with Jest and PostgreSQL.
career.HORNET.title: QA Engineer
career.HORNET.description: Tested e2e with Cypress, APIs with Postman, integrated CI on GitLab, implemented Semantic Release, developed TypeScript/Node.js endpoints and Go script for CI cleanup.
career.BAR.title: Bartender
career.BAR.description: Demonstrated excellent stress management and customer service skills
career.VGROUP.title: Assistant Captain
career.VGROUP.description: Sailed in 20+ countries, managed navigation/crew, supervised loading, developed skills in maritime regulations and emergency management.
